products.name: Agent Handoff Kit
products.summary: Structured handoff templates and an installable skill preview for preserving context between AI coding agents, human operators, and sessions.

products.name: Agent Eval Kit
products.summary: Coding-agent evaluation templates with a free mini-eval, scorecard, scoring rubric, regression log, and setup workflow.

products.name: Agent Commerce Starter Kit
products.summary: Templates for agent-readable digital product packaging: llms.txt, product.json, catalog metadata, checkout copy, and buyer-agent QA prompts.
